title: valeriana acutiloba var. glabra
intro: Valeriana acutiloba var. glabra, also known as the Korean valerian, is a variant of the valerian plant species, belonging to the family Valerianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include sedative and anti-anxiety effects due to the presence of valepotriates and isovaleric acid. The health benefits of Valeriana acutiloba var. glabra include improving sleep quality, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
